title: Clean Rain
description: A simple resource pack that makes Minecraft rain particles softer and less eye-straining
body:
This resource pack improves the default Minecraft rain particles by making them softer, smoother, and less visually aggressive.

The vanilla rain effect can often feel too distracting, especially during long play sessions or in darker environments. This pack reduces that problem while keeping the original Minecraft atmosphere and style.

## 🔹 What this pack changes

Reworked rain particle texture

More transparent and natural appearance

Less pixelated visual effect

## 🔹 Benefits

More comfortable visuals during rainy weather

Reduced eye strain

Cleaner and calmer overall look

No impact on performance

Fully vanilla-friendly

## 🎯 Why use this pack?
This pack is perfect for players who like the original Minecraft rain but want it to be less “in-your-face.” It keeps the same mechanics and style while making the effect much more pleasant to look at.

Ideal for survival, building, and long gameplay sessions where comfort matters.
